Caption: Scheme of the experimental apparatus for the investigation of the condensation heat transfer coefficient. The flow paths of the working fluid propane between the evaporator and the condenser (dashed lines) and of the liquid condensate for the investigation of the inundation effect (solid lines) are given. Additionally, a cross-section of the condenser is included where the perforated tubes for the investigation of the inundation effect (1) and the four rows of condensation tubes (2–5) are highlighted.
Inundation experiment for a finned copper-nickel tube with a fin density of 30 fpi at ϑ sat = 30 °C, q̇ = 20.6 kW·m− 2, and Re film = 442.4.
